headers.subject: Fwd: Cabin Plans - Roofing and siding

subject: Fwd: Cabin Plans - Roofing and siding
body:
Roof materials

---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Brant Barnes <brant@bestbuymetals.com>
Date: Wed, Nov 15, 2023 at 11:15 AM
Subject: Re: Cabin Plans - Roofing and siding
To: Don Gohore Be Huszar <antonio.hudnall@gmail.com>


Antonio,

Excellent. Let me know once you'd like to move forward with this order!

Best,
Brant
ᐧ

On Wed, Nov 15, 2023 at 2:08 PM Don Gohore Be Huszar <
antonio.hudnall@gmail.com> wrote:

> Yes, everything looks good.
> 15K for exterior and roof.
> 5K for the foundation.
> not including labor of course.
>
> On Mon, Nov 13, 2023 at 6:21 AM Brant Barnes <brant@bestbuymetals.com>
> wrote:
>
>> Hi Antonio,
>>
>> I'm just checking in to see if you had time to review the estimate I sent
>> you and to see how the project is coming along.
>>
>> Call me or email me with your thoughts.
>>

>> wrote:

>>>
